info.description: REST API for the Athleton platform.
info.title: Athleton API

get.description: Get a paginated list of admin roles

post.description: Create a new admin role with permissions

get.description: Get all available permissions grouped by resource
Get an admin role's details including permissions

delete.description: Delete an admin role (cannot delete if users are assigned)

patch.description: Update an admin role's details and permissions

get.description: Get a paginated list of configs
Find a config with the provided key

patch.description: Update a config with the provided details

get.description: Get a paginated list of audit logs
Find a log with the provided ID
Get a paginated list of users

post.description: Create a new admin account with an assigned admin role; the account must rotate its password on first login

get.description: Find a user with the provided ID

patch.description: Update a user with the provided details

post.description: Assign an admin role to a user (changes user role to admin)
Root sets a new password for an admin account
Authenticate with username and password and return auth tokens
Exchange a refresh token for a new access token
Register a new user account and return auth tokens

get.description: Get a paginated list of publicly visible configs
Find a publicly visible config by key; private keys 404
get.summary: Find a public config by key

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and JWT token.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
